narrative:
Riverside Local Sd (Lake) school district has 28,476 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.3% D−R vs -15.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
